description_long: This greenhouse features a modern, rectangular structure with a prominent glass-roofed section attached to a larger, opaque-walled building. The glass roof is supported by a visible metal frame, allowing ample sunlight to enter the growing area. Adjacent to the greenhouse, there are tiered garden beds with green patches and several stylized white trees, suggesting an integrated outdoor planting area. The perimeter is enclosed by concrete or stone walls, providing privacy and separation from the surrounding environment. A paved path leads to the greenhouse entrance, and a small section of the wall is adorned with climbing plants. The overall design is clean and functional, blending utilitarian greenhouse elements with landscaped outdoor features.
description: A modern greenhouse with a glass roof, metal frame, and attached opaque building, surrounded by tiered garden beds and stylized trees within a walled enclosure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glass-roofed greenhouse, attached building, tiered garden beds, and stylized trees behind a concrete wall.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the greenhouse, the glass roof, and the stepped garden beds with trees.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the solid wall, the back of the greenhouse, and a single tree visible over the wall.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying the arrangement of the greenhouse, garden beds, trees, and the paved area within the enclosure.
